---
title: "index.ts"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\types\index.ts"
loc: 30
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.40
style_score: 4.20
intel_score: 2.00
overall_score: 5.28
---

## Intent
The `types/index.ts` module defines the specific TypeScript interfaces for the PennyOne visualization layer. It extends the D3-force-3d simulation types to include repository-specific metadata such as file paths, Gungnir matrix metrics, and gravitational mass, ensuring type safety across the visual cortex.

## Interaction Protocol
Import the `Node` and `Link` interfaces when developing visualization components. These interfaces define the contract for data flowing between the D3 simulation, the React components, and the Three.js rendering engine.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.2/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://d3-force-3d)

### Exports
- `d3`
- `d3`
